# Implementation Report: Phase 4 Footer Components (Task #13 + #14)
Generated: 2026-04-12T19:05:00Z

## Task
Implement public-footer.tsx and dealer-footer.tsx following dt-elektrix template design system with TDD workflow.

## TDD Summary

### Tests Written (36 total - all passing)

**public-footer.test.tsx (20 tests):**
- renders footer element with contentinfo role
- renders brand logo area with border-radius 20px
- renders address, phone, email contact info
- renders 4 social media icons with aria-labels
- renders 4 link column headings (Hizli Menu, Kategoriler, Kurumsal, Destek)

- renders Destek links: SSS, Iade, Kargo Takibi

- renders copyright with current year
- renders 6 payment method indicators (VISA, Mastercard, PayPal, EFT, Kapida, Google Pay)
- validates bg-[#1e1e1e], grid responsive classes, link colors, hover colors, divider colors
- confirms server component (no use client)

**dealer-footer.test.tsx (16 tests):**
- renders footer element with contentinfo role
- renders brand name (Next AI Teknoloji)
- renders address, phone, email contact info
- renders 4 social media icons
- renders link column headings
- renders bayi-specific links: Profilim, Satis Yonetimi, Raporlar, Depo Yonetimi, Musteri Destek
- renders at least 8 footer links
- renders copyright with current year
- renders payment method indicators
- validates bg-[#1e1e1e], grid responsive classes
- confirms no newsletter form (no use client state)
- validates hover color #2189ff

### Implementation

**public-footer.tsx:**
- Replaced lucide-react icons with inline SVG components (fixes jsdom test compatibility)
- Top section: Logo (rounded-[20px]) + Contact (address, phone, email) + 4 social icons
- Middle section: 4-column grid (Hizli Menu, Kategoriler, Kurumsal, Destek)
- Bottom section: Copyright + 6 payment icons (VISA, Mastercard, PayPal, EFT, Kapida, Google Pay)
- CSS variables used: --DTPrimaryColor, --DTContainer, --DTGutter_Width, --DTBaseTransition
- Responsive: grid-cols-1 / sm:grid-cols-2 / lg:grid-cols-4
- Colors: bg-[#1e1e1e], text #bebebe, hover #2189ff, border #e9e9e9

**dealer-footer.tsx:**
- Same inline SVG approach, no lucide-react dependency
- Removed "use client" directive and newsletter form (now server component)
- Bayi-specific links: Profilim, Satis Yonetimi, Raporlar, Depo Yonetimi, Musteri Destek
- 4-column layout: About+Contact | Bayi Portal | Magaza | Destek
- Payment section: SSL, Mastercard, VISA, TROY
- Same responsive grid and color scheme as public footer
